decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_b44-limited via base_record_id. Source evidence from 201111_nostrand_cb1_slides matches the registry record which carries the same source_id and B44 Limited limited_stop variant. No different record ID to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Currently served by B44 bus route

proposed_relations.description: B44 Limited is predecessor to B44 SBS; source says 'B44 Limited will become SBS'

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_b44-local via base_record_id. Source evidence describes B44 local buses turning around at Flushing Avenue, consistent with the registry record for B44 Local. No different record ID to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 local buses will turn around at Flushing Avenue, as they do now

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_b44-sbs via base_record_id. Source evidence describes proposed B44 SBS on Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave corridor, matching the registry record's B44 Select Bus Service. No different record ID to link to.
